//: Node-side typecheck for the Deno `api` Edge Function tree (ADR-0019). Bundler resolution + allowImportingTsExtensions so the explicit-.ts Deno source typechecks on Node. index.ts is excluded because it references the Deno global (validated by `supabase functions serve`/deploy, and by `deno check` in CI later). Deps + this config are owned at the repo root because supabase/ is a root-level dir, not part of the apps/backend workspace.
